title: Player Locator Settings
description: A datapack that gives players control over their locator waypoint
body:
Lets players change their player locator settings in the pause menu! This uses the new dialog system.

THIS IS A DATAPACK, SO IT IS SERVER SIDE!

This adds a button the pause menu called "Player Locator", as shown in the following screenshot:
![Adds this button to pause menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66ace25ffa13613338f725487d01bff2e1fbcea_0.webp)

This menu allows for customization of your personal waypoint transmission range, style, and color!
![Main Page](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00b20a51c3378e1257d186e54bf4491f33301899_0.webp)

Here are the visibility settings:

![Visibility Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d918aeb37ab493f1413bf90d57c63325941521f5_0.webp)

Here are the style settings (there are only two default styles)

![Style Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/60ba564e0c53711c61e5b65ea20f6a54c054774b_0.webp)

Here are the color settings:

![Color Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/12eff4b63f7b7831756624d7568e8511544a1d1a_0.webp)

Here are the waypoint range settings:

![Range Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e1199ce212d5d19d265130ea13e813a8b33ed3f3_0.webp)
